caption: A woman with long dark hair wearing a purple and white striped button-down shirt and black over-ear headphones is speaking while facing the camera. She is positioned indoors in front of a light-colored wall and yellow curtains with a blue border. A light brown surface is visible behind her to the right. The text "Nancy Ramya" appears in the bottom left corner of the scene. Throughout the sequence, she maintains her position while speaking, with her mouth moving and her facial expressions shifting slightly as she talks. Her head tilts and her gaze shifts marginally as she continues her speech across the frames.
